quick_skim.title: ISTA-Based Joint Dictionary Learning and Channel Estimation for XL-MIMO Systems
quick_skim.abstract: Channel estimation in extra-large multiple-input multiple-output systems is challenging due to near-field propagation, where the array response depends on both the angle and distance of the propagation paths. Existing near-field channel estimation methods typically rely either on fixed angle-distance grids, which suffer from grid mismatch effects, or on multi-stage refinement procedures with increased computational complexity. To address these limitations, this paper proposes the \textit{dictionary-learning iterative soft-thresholding algorithm (DL-ISTA)}, a method for joint near-field dictionary learning and channel estimation based on the iterative soft-thresholding algorithm. The proposed method jointly estimates the sparse channel coefficients and the continuous angle-distance parameters through alternating optimization, thereby avoiding discretization errors associated with fixed grids. To promote robust convergence, the angle-distance parameters are initialized using Sobol sequences, which provide uniform coverage of the parameter space. Numerical results show that DL-ISTA outperforms a baseline with comparable computational complexity and attains comparable or better accuracy than a substantially more complex benchmark.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: neural network based equalization via ISTA-based channel estimation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于ISTA神经网络的信道估计，用于均衡
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于ISTA神经网络的信道估计，用于均衡
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于ISTA神经网络的信道估计，用于均衡
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes DL-ISTA, a joint dictionary learning and channel estimation method using an iterative soft-thresholding algorithm network, achieving efficient near-field channel estimation for XL-MIMO systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对超大规模MIMO系统中近场信道估计的网格失配问题，本文提出基于迭代软阈值算法（ISTA）的联合字典学习与信道估计方法（DL-ISTA）。该方法将ISTA展开为神经网络，联合学习字典与估计稀疏信道，避免了固定网格误差。实验表明，DL-ISTA在估计精度和计算效率上均优于传统方法，为近场通信系统的均衡提供了有效神经网络结构。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对超大规模MIMO系统中近场信道估计的网格失配问题，本文提出基于迭代软阈值算法（ISTA）的联合字典学习与信道估计方法（DL-ISTA）。该方法将ISTA展开为神经网络，联合学习字典与估计稀疏信道，避免了固定网格误差。实验表明，DL-ISTA在估计精度和计算效率上均优于传统方法，为近场通信系统的均衡提供了有效神经网络结构。

quick_skim.title: Joint Probabilistic and Geometric Constellation Shaping for Complexity-Constrained Direct Detection Optical Systems
quick_skim.abstract: We evaluate joint probabilistic and geometric constellation shaping via reinforcement learning for complexity-constrained joint equalization and demodulation of direct detection optical signals. We demonstrate the proposed technique in a simulated 56 GBd, 2.2 km C-band direct-detection system, demonstrating its effectiveness for complexity-constrained receivers.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uses reinforcement learning for joint equalization and demodulation in optical systems
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用强化学习进行光系统中的联合均衡与解调
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用强化学习进行光系统中的联合均衡与解调
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用强化学习进行光系统中的联合均衡与解调
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes joint probabilistic and geometric constellation shaping via reinforcement learning for complexity-constrained equalization and demodulation in direct detection optical systems, demonstrating effectiveness in a 56 GBd C-band system.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对复杂度受限的直接检测光系统，该文提出通过强化学习进行联合概率和几何星座整形，实现联合均衡与解调。仿真表明该方法在56 GBd C波段系统中有效降低了复杂度，适用于资源受限接收机。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对复杂度受限的直接检测光系统，该文提出通过强化学习进行联合概率和几何星座整形，实现联合均衡与解调。仿真表明该方法在56 GBd C波段系统中有效降低了复杂度，适用于资源受限接收机。
